name: Argus
serverDescription: UI testing, screenshots, browser automation, and mobile simulator control. Supports web, iOS, Android, macOS, and terminal platforms.

name: AppXray
serverDescription: Runtime app inspection and debugging. Connect to running apps (web, iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, macOS, Node.js) to inspect state, UI hierarchy, network traffic, and performance.

name: Octocode
serverDescription: Semantic code research, repository search, local code exploration, and LSP-powered definition/reference lookup across accessible repositories.

name: Sentry
serverDescription: Error monitoring integration. Query recent crashes, stack traces, error frequency, and release health from Sentry.
